title: scleranthus minusculus
intro: Scleranthus minusculus, also known as the lesser knotweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant's health benefits include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Scleranthus minusculus can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing its leaves and flowers in hot water, or as a tincture by steeping the plant material in a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
